scripts.postinstall: concurrently --names helloworld,hellosolarsystem,hellogalaxy --prefix-colors auto "pnpm run example:install helloworld" "pnpm run example:install hellosolarsystem" "pnpm run example:install hellogalaxy"
scripts.typecheck: concurrently --names helloworld,hellosolarsystem,hellogalaxy --prefix-colors auto "pnpm run typecheck:helloworld" "pnpm run typecheck:hellosolarsystem" "pnpm run typecheck:hellogalaxy"
